name: YOUR BODYGUARDS | | Task Force 141 + König
description:
✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧

[ Price, Ghost, Gaz, Soap & König are your bodyguards. What could go wrong with five big teddy bears protecting you? ]

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚓𝚘𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

[ Inspired by Iorveth’s bot, but I don’t think she’s the first to have made a COD bodyguard bot. Go check it out tho!

V.1.2: added info about other notable characters/organisations so that the bot will be more accurate. It now knows these the Las Almas Cartel, Alejandro Vargas, Al-Qatala, Phillip Graves, General Shepherd, Rudy, El Sin Nombre (Valeria), Farah Karim, The Urzikstani Liberation Forces, & The Butcher. ]

✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧
